selections.name: Dust Cloud
selections.reason: Doomben flip applies; tracked speed nicely last start and will relish the expansive Eagle Farm track.

selections.name: Edge Of Infinity
selections.reason: Waller and Maloney combination; closed well last start and suited to the uphill straight.

selections.name: Love Rebel
selections.reason: Consistent form with a solid second at Sunshine Coast; maps well from an inside draw.

selections.name: Savasteel (NZ)
selections.reason: Placed in the wet recently but carries a heavy weight penalty on the soft track.

danger_horse.name: Edge Of Infinity
danger_horse.reason: Elite stable and jockey combo makes her a massive threat if the pace is hot.

selections.name: Saturdays Girl
selections.reason: Waller/Maloney combo; consistent form and handles wet tracks well.

selections.name: Iconify
selections.reason: Classic Doomben flip; came from last on the turn there and will love the long Eagle Farm straight.

selections.name: Old Faithful (NZ)
selections.reason: Solid second at Sunshine Coast; strips fitter third-up and handles the sting out of the ground.

selections.name: Tassorati
selections.reason: Faded late at Doomben; the uphill straight is a concern but has early speed.

danger_horse.name: Iconify
danger_horse.reason: Swooper profile perfectly matches the Eagle Farm track bias.

selections.name: Miss Chastain (IRE)
selections.reason: Drops to 54kg which is a massive advantage in this BM78; won well fresh at Newcastle.

selections.name: High Dandy (NZ)
selections.reason: Won well at Gold Coast on heavy; handles the conditions and maps perfectly from barrier 1.

selections.name: Sosino (IRE)
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick but carries a significant 62kg weight penalty on the soft track.

selections.name: Flying Bat
selections.reason: Bolted in at Ballina on heavy ground; drops to 55kg and is a major player in this class.

danger_horse.name: Sosino (IRE)
danger_horse.reason: Class runner of the field; if he overcomes the 62kg impost, he can win again.

selections.name: Our Huntress (NZ)
selections.reason: Brings strong NSW provincial form; lightly raced and looks a class above these.

selections.name: Agadoo
selections.reason: Solid second at Gold Coast when resuming; strips fitter and handles wet ground.

selections.name: Toobloos
selections.reason: Placed at Gold Coast and draws the inside; should get a soft run in transit.

selections.name: St Andrews
selections.reason: Resuming but showed ability last prep with a close second at Ipswich.

danger_horse.name: Agadoo
danger_horse.reason: Showed good improvement first-up and can challenge the favorite.

selections.name: Damehood (NZ)
selections.reason: Won well at Doomben; talented type who can overcome the wide draw and weight.

selections.name: Hermione Prancer
selections.reason: Waller filly dropping to 55kg; won well fresh last prep and trialed nicely.

selections.name: Moonan Quartz
selections.reason: Won nicely at Sunshine Coast on a rain-affected track; maps well to be competitive.

selections.name: Gagnante Enchere
selections.reason: Tracked the speed and boxed on well at Doomben; gets a 54kg weight bonus.

danger_horse.name: Hermione Prancer
danger_horse.reason: Elite stable runner with a light weight; very dangerous if she replicates her fresh form.

selections.name: Teelg
selections.reason: Won well on a heavy track at Sunshine Coast first-up; handles the conditions perfectly.

selections.name: Siesta
selections.reason: Brings solid Sydney form; resumes here and draws the inside for a soft run.

selections.name: Stein
selections.reason: Boxed on steadily at Doomben; fitter for this and can improve.

selections.name: Mehretu
selections.reason: Placed at this track previously; resumes and can run a strong race fresh.

danger_horse.name: Siesta
danger_horse.reason: Classy mare who can easily win this if she brings her best NSW form.
